'''âng-th-sh''' ('''kangathash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaptate|coaptate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaptate|coaptate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-th-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangathash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingathash|thingathash]] || [[word:jingathash|jingathash]] || [[word:shingathash|shingathash]] || [[word:kingathash|kingathash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungathash|thuthungathash]] || [[word:jujungathash|jujungathash]] || [[word:shushungathash|shushungathash]] || [[word:kukungathash|kukungathash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungathash|thungathash]] || [[word:jungathash|jungathash]] || [[word:shungathash|shungathash]] || [[word:kungathash|kungathash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungathash|thungathash]] || [[word:jungathash|jungathash]] || [[word:shungathash|shungathash]] || [[word:kungathash|kungathash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengathash|thengathash]] || [[word:jengathash|jengathash]] || [[word:shengathash|shengathash]] || [[word:kengathash|kengathash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongathash|thothongathash]] || [[word:jojongathash|jojongathash]] || [[word:shoshongathash|shoshongathash]] || [[word:kokongathash|kokongathash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongathash|thongathash]] || [[word:jongathash|jongathash]] || [[word:shongathash|shongathash]] || [[word:kongathash|kongathash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongathash|thongathash]] || [[word:jongathash|jongathash]] || [[word:shongathash|shongathash]] || [[word:kongathash|kongathash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngathash|thĂŠngathash]] || [[word:jĂŠngathash|jĂŠngathash]] || [[word:shĂŠngathash|shĂŠngathash]] || [[word:kĂŠngathash|kĂŠngathash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangathash|thathangathash]] || [[word:jajangathash|jajangathash]] || [[word:shashangathash|shashangathash]] || [[word:kakangathash|kakangathash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangathash|thangathash]] || [[word:jangathash|jangathash]] || [[word:shangathash|shangathash]] || [[word:kangathash|kangathash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangathash|thangathash]] || [[word:jangathash|jangathash]] || [[word:shangathash|shangathash]] || [[word:kangathash|kangathash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangathash|shangathash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangathash|goshangathash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangathash|gokishangathash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangathashnĂŒ|shangathashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangathashnknĂŒ|goshangathashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathashnĂŒ|gokishangathashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangathashĂ«|shangathashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangathashnkshĂ«|goshangathashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangathashĂ«|gokishangathashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathashro|shangathashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathashnkro|goshangathashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathashro|gokishangathashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathashmu|shangathashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathashnkmu|goshangathashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathashmu|gokishangathashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangathasher|shangathasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangathashnksher|goshangathashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangathasher|gokishangathasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangathashng|shangathashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangathashnkng|goshangathashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangathashng|gokishangathashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangathashya|shangathashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangathashnkya|goshangathashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangathashya|gokishangathashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangathashyam|shangathashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangathashnkyam|goshangathashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangathashyam|gokishangathashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathashnĂŒshĂ«|shangathashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangathashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangathashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathashnĂŒro|shangathashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathashnknĂŒro|goshangathashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathashnĂŒro|gokishangathashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathashnĂŒmu|shangathashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathashnknĂŒmu|goshangathashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathashnĂŒmu|gokishangathashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathashĂ«nĂŒ|shangathashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangathashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangathashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathashĂ«ro|shangathashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathashnkshĂ«ro|goshangathashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathashĂ«ro|gokishangathashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathashĂ«mu|shangathashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathashnkshĂ«mu|goshangathashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathashĂ«mu|gokishangathashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathashronĂŒ|shangathashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathashnkronĂŒ|goshangathashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathashronĂŒ|gokishangathashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathashroshĂ«|shangathashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathashnkroshĂ«|goshangathashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathashroshĂ«|gokishangathashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangathashromu|shangathashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangathashnkromu|goshangathashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangathashromu|gokishangathashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangathashmunĂŒ|shangathashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangathashnkmunĂŒ|goshangathashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangathashmunĂŒ|gokishangathashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangathashmushĂ«|shangathashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangathashnkmushĂ«|goshangathashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangathashmushĂ«|gokishangathashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangathashmuro|shangathashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangathashnkmuro|goshangathashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangathashmuro|gokishangathashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
